title: A4 Picture Frame, A4 Wooden Photo Frame, Versatile Black Frame with Safe Perspex Front & Wall Hanging Hooks - For Home, Office, Landscape or Portrait Orientation, Wall-Mount & Desk Stand(Black)
features: 【 Perfect Size】The inner dimensions of the frame are 21 x 29.7 cm (A4 size), which is perfect for standard printing, and the outer frame measures 25x33 cm, making it a versatile and popular size for displaying a wide range of artworks and photos.

【Anti-Breaking Plexiglass】This A4 photo frame is made of high-quality plexiglass, which prevents accidental breakage. It is a safe option for people with children because you don't have to worry about getting injured due to accidental glass breakage.

【Easy to Hang or Tabletop】A4 picture frames can be wall-mounted or freestanding - they can be mounted on any wall in the living room, bedroom or study, or placed on a desk, shelf or bedside table for more options.

【Scope of Application】Photo frames adorn the table tops or walls of family bedrooms, offices, living rooms, dining rooms, kitchens, bathrooms and playrooms, beautifying the room and making the mood pleasant.
【NOTE】There is a protective film on the plastic plexiglass, please remove the protective film before use, so that the photo can be displayed more clearly.
